pdg_node.statement: (state_in: SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x, fixed covariance/gain, F, B}, u: control vector, B: control matrix override (optional)) -> SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_pred, fixed covariance/gain, F, B, H, R}
pdg_node.informal_desc: Steady-state predict kernel variant where covariance/gain are treated as fixed and only the latent mean transition is applied.

declaration.name: predictlatentstatesteadystate
declaration.type_signature: (state_in: SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x, fixed covariance/gain, F, B}, u: control vector, B: control matrix override (optional)) -> SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_pred, fixed covariance/gain, F, B, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Steady-state predict kernel variant where covariance/gain are treated as fixed and only the latent mean transition is applied.
declaration.conceptual_summary: AffineStatePropagationWithFrozenUncertainty. Performs a one-step affine evolution of an internal state vector using a linear transition operator and an optional external actuation term. Only the first moment is propagated: all second-order/statistical tensors and precomputed correction operators are treated as constants and passed through unchanged. The result is a new immutable state specification with updated vector component and preserved fixed parameters.. Applications: Real-time robotics: propagate a reduced-order pose/velocity latent vector with fixed uncertainty calibration between sensor corrections, Computational neuroscience: evolve low-dimensional neural population activity state under known stimulation with fixed decoder statistics, Chemical process engineering: advance a linearized reactor state estimate under control actions while holding noise/correction operators constant, Power systems operation: short-horizon grid state propagation with fixed estimator tuning during quasi-stationary operating windows

declaration.name: predictlatentstatesteadystate
declaration.type_signature: (state_in: SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x, fixed covariance/gain, F, B}, u: control vector, B: control matrix override (optional)) -> SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_pred, fixed covariance/gain, F, B, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Steady-state predict kernel variant where covariance/gain are treated as fixed and only the latent mean transition is applied.

pdg_node.statement: (x: latent mean vector, z: measurement vector, H: measurement matrix) -> tuple[predicted measurement vector, residual vector]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Pure observation oracle that maps latent state to predicted measurement and innovation residual; performs no persistent state writes.

declaration.name: evaluatemeasurementoracle
declaration.type_signature: (x: latent mean vector, z: measurement vector, H: measurement matrix) -> tuple[predicted measurement vector, residual vector]
declaration.docstring: Pure observation oracle that maps latent state to predicted measurement and innovation residual; performs no persistent state writes.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Linear Observation Projection and Residual Oracle. Applies a linear operator to an internal state vector to generate an expected observation in a separate measurement space. It then computes an innovation vector as the elementwise difference between the observed vector and the projected expectation. The operation is purely evaluative and produces outputs without mutating persistent state.. Applications: Robotics: project configuration-space estimates into sensor-space expectations and compute discrepancy for closed-loop correction., Medical imaging: map latent reconstruction coefficients to expected detector readings and compute residuals for iterative refinement., Power systems: project grid state estimates to meter-space predictions and compute innovation vectors for anomaly localization., Acoustics: map source-parameter estimates to microphone-array observations and compute residuals for model calibration.

pdg_node.statement: (predicted_state_steady: SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_pred, fixed gain/covariance, H, R}, z: measurement vector, innovation: measurement residual (optional explicit input)) -> SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_post, fixed gain/covariance, F, B, H, R}
pdg_node.informal_desc: Steady-state update kernel variant using fixed gain/covariance assumptions; returns a new posterior latent state.

declaration.name: updateposteriorstatesteadystate
declaration.type_signature: (predicted_state_steady: SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_pred, fixed gain/covariance, H, R}, z: measurement vector, innovation: measurement residual (optional explicit input)) -> SteadyStateModelSpec{latent_mean x_post, fixed gain/covariance, F, B, H, R}
declaration.docstring: Steady-state update kernel variant using fixed gain/covariance assumptions; returns a new posterior latent state.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Fixed-Parameter Linear Latent-State Correction. Applies a single-step affine correction to a predicted latent vector using an observation-space discrepancy and a precomputed constant gain matrix. If the discrepancy is not provided, it is recomputed as the difference between the observed vector and the predicted observation projection. The operation updates only the latent mean while reusing fixed structural matrices and uncertainty assumptions, yielding a new immutable state descriptor.. Applications: Real-time correction of a reduced-order fluid-dynamics state using sparse sensor snapshots in computational physics., Incremental alignment of latent pose estimates in autonomous navigation using streaming geometric measurements., Online refinement of hidden neural population activity vectors from electrophysiology observations in neuroscience., Adaptive correction of reactor internal-state estimates from process instrumentation in chemical engineering.
